signals.headline: Price Oil Co. sells to Cedar County Cooperative
signals.summary:
Price Oil is a family-owned business that has been supplying propane and diesel products to farms, businesses and homes since 1962.

The post Price Oil Co. sells to Cedar County Cooperative first appeared on LP Gas .

signals.headline: Cedar County Cooperative Acquires Price Oil Company in Iowa
signals.summary: Cedar County Cooperative Acquires Price Oil Company in Iowa cmiller Wed, 06/03/2026 - 11:46 B&A Energy Partners announced that Cedar County Cooperative has acquired Price Oil Company of Durant, Iowa, bringing together two organizations with deep commitments to customer service, community relationships and dependable l…

signals.headline: Heartland Co-op acquires Legacy Propane
signals.summary:
Legacy Energy Consulting announced the successful sale of Legacy Propane in Allison, Iowa, to Heartland Co-op, headquartered in Clive, Iowa.

The post Heartland Co-op acquires Legacy Propane first appeared on LP Gas .

signals.headline: Heartland Co-op Acquires Legacy Propane
signals.summary: Heartland Co-op Acquires Legacy Propane cmiller Mon, 06/01/2026 - 13:07 Fountain Hills, Ariz.
